attempt: Close the finite-window shortcut: a verified Goldbach window is a certificate only on its stated domain and cannot be promoted to all even integers without an explicit large-even theorem.
formal_micro_lemma_statement: A Goldbach certificate over even integers 4<=n<=B does not decide any even n>B. A proof for all even n must combine the finite certificate with a separate theorem covering the tail.

micro_lemma_certificate.proof_reason: The universal claim ranges over infinitely many even integers outside the finite certificate.

remaining_obligation: A genuine Goldbach proof needs a positive two-prime representation lower bound beyond an explicit cutoff.
claim_boundary: No Goldbach proof and no Goldbach counterexample found in the certified finite window.
